notes: Solid snake implementation with proper collision detection, speed scaling, high score persistence, and pause/title screens, but score/HUD text overlaps the grid during gameplay and the grid is only 20x20 cells but canvas is 600px with 30px cells leaving no border padding issues.
A critical bug mixing Date.now() with requestAnimationFrame's DOMHighResTimeStamp causes the game loop to permanently freeze as soon as the game starts.

A solid and complete Snake implementation with pause/title/game-over states and proper food spawning, but strict self-collision logic, always-visible food under overlays, and a few polish edge cases keep it from scoring higher.
